titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 756

p.seg: Henry son of the king of Scotland to all his men as well French as English sends greeting.

to have given and granted Swinton to the monks of Saint Cuthbert to be possessed for ever, and to be dealt with freely as their demesne service, just as the charter of my uncle King Edgar of good memory bears witness and as my father granted and restored to them. And I will and instruct that no one should disturb them or make claims in respect of this, since I have granted it in perpetual alms, for the health of my soul, and of my parents’ [souls], namely King Malcolm and Queen Margaret, and of their sons’ and daughters’ [souls].
As witness Eustace fitz John, Robert de Umfraville, Herbert the chamberlain, Gilbert de Umfraville, William de Somerville.
